non_inheritable_rules: The flagship route may use editorial naming or copy that generic /work/[slug] routes may not inherit.
Flagship-specific meta emphasis is allowed only on /imc.
Flagship-only art direction may deepen emphasis, but may not redefine the generic section grammar.

declared_overrides.editorial_context: institutional proof route, not generic product dossier

prohibited_leakage: No generic product page may claim flagship status.
No generic product page may import /imc-only editorial copy by default.
No generic product page may flatten IMC-specific narrative into family law.
